calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-05-2009 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-31-2008 Continued To Feb-20-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Dec-30-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
No appearance by defendants New City Communications, Inc., Joan Cathleen Sanders, Brad Sanders or Todd Sanders.
Default entered against defendants on October 23, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on October 23, 2008.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on December 29, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the Defaulted Defendants New City Communications, Inc., Joan Cathleen Sanders, Brad Sanders and Todd Sanders as follows:

Damages/Principal - $59,334.67.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,731.68.
Attorney's Fees - $2,500.00.
Costs - $535.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $65,101.35.

It is further Ordered and Adjudged that plaintiff Bank of the West is the owner of the leased equipment described in Exhibits A-1 & A-2 attached to the Judgment.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
